name: Enhanced Upload to Social Media with Analytics Tracking

nodes.name: Google Drive - New Video
nodes.notes: Triggers when new video is uploaded

parameters.query:
=-- Verify all IDs exist and get additional context
SELECT 
  s.script_id,
  s.script_text,
  i.idea_id,
  i.idea_text,
  hv.hook_variant_id,
  hv.hook_text,
  t.transcript_id,
  sr.source_reel_id,
  sr.caption,
  c.niche,
  gv.video_id as generated_video_id
FROM scripts s
JOIN ideas i ON s.idea_id = i.idea_id
LEFT JOIN hook_variants hv ON s.hook_variant_id = hv.hook_variant_id
JOIN transcripts t ON s.transcript_id = t.transcript_id
LEFT JOIN source_reels sr ON t.source_reel_id = sr.source_reel_id
LEFT JOIN creators c ON sr.creator_id = c.creator_id
LEFT JOIN generated_videos gv ON s.script_id = gv.script_id
WHERE s.script_id = '{{ $json.script_id }}'
LIMIT 1;

nodes.name: Wait for Processing
nodes.notes: Wait for Instagram to process video

parameters.query:
=-- Insert posted content with ALL tracking IDs
INSERT INTO content (
  content_id,
  account_id,
  platform,
  content_type,
  title,
  hook,
  idea,
  url,
  posted_at,
  metadata,
  
  -- CRITICAL: All foreign keys for analytics tracking
  generated_video_id,
  script_id,
  idea_id,
  hook_variant_id,
  transcript_id,
  source_reel_id,
  
  created_at
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Instagram - Publish').item.json.id }}',
  'YOUR_INSTAGRAM_ACCOUNT_ID', -- Replace with actual account ID from accounts table
  'instagram',
  'reel',
  '{{ $('Get Full Context from DB').item.json.hook_text }}',
  '{{ $('Get Full Context from DB').item.json.hook_text }}',
  '{{ $('Get Full Context from DB').item.json.idea_text }}',
  'https://www.instagram.com/p/{{ $('Instagram - Publish').item.json.id }}/',
  NOW(),
  '{{ JSON.stringify({
    caption: $('Generate Caption').item.json.caption,
    niche: $('Get Full Context from DB').item.json.niche,
    source_caption: $('Get Full Context from DB').item.json.caption
  }) }}',
  
  -- All tracking IDs
  {{ $('Get Full Context from DB').item.json.generated_video_id ? "'" + $('Get Full Context from DB').item.json.generated_video_id + "'" : "NULL" }},
  '{{ $('Get Full Context from DB').item.json.script_id }}',
  '{{ $('Get Full Context from DB').item.json.idea_id }}',
  {{ $('Get Full Context from DB').item.json.hook_variant_id ? "'" + $('Get Full Context from DB').item.json.hook_variant_id + "'" : "NULL" }},
  '{{ $('Get Full Context from DB').item.json.transcript_id }}',
  {{ $('Get Full Context from DB').item.json.source_reel_id ? "'" + $('Get Full Context from DB').item.json.source_reel_id + "'" : "NULL" }},
  
  NOW()
)
RETURNING content_id;

=-- Also save TikTok post
INSERT INTO content (
  content_id,
  account_id,
  platform,
  content_type,
  title,
  hook,
  idea,
  url,
  posted_at,
  metadata,
  
  generated_video_id,
  script_id,
  idea_id,
  hook_variant_id,
  transcript_id,
  source_reel_id,
  
  created_at
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $crypto.randomUUID() }}',
  'YOUR_TIKTOK_ACCOUNT_ID',
  'tiktok',
  'video',
  '{{ $('Get Full Context from DB').item.json.hook_text }}',
  '{{ $('Get Full Context from DB').item.json.hook_text }}',
  '{{ $('Get Full Context from DB').item.json.idea_text }}',
  'https://www.tiktok.com/@yourhandle/video/PENDING',
  NOW(),
  '{{ JSON.stringify({
    caption: $('Generate Caption').item.json.caption,
    upload_response: $('TikTok - Upload').item.json
  }) }}',
  
  {{ $('Get Full Context from DB').item.json.generated_video_id ? "'" + $('Get Full Context from DB').item.json.generated_video_id + "'" : "NULL" }},
  '{{ $('Get Full Context from DB').item.json.script_id }}',
  '{{ $('Get Full Context from DB').item.json.idea_id }}',
  {{ $('Get Full Context from DB').item.json.hook_variant_id ? "'" + $('Get Full Context from DB').item.json.hook_variant_id + "'" : "NULL" }},
  '{{ $('Get Full Context from DB').item.json.transcript_id }}',
  {{ $('Get Full Context from DB').item.json.source_reel_id ? "'" + $('Get Full Context from DB').item.json.source_reel_id + "'" : "NULL" }},
  
  NOW()
)
RETURNING content_id;

✅ Full analytics tracking enabled!
